title: Looking for Category Manager at OYO Rooms

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at OYO Rooms
jsonLd.description:
Join the OYO Rooms family as a Category Manager in Thane. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About OYO Rooms:
OYO Rooms is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OYO Rooms!
